name: Frozen Graham Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a freezing tray thoroughly.
2. Coat the sides and bottom of the tray with half the graham cracker crumbs, reserving the remainder for topping.
3. Beat the eggs. Add sugar and vanilla, continuing to beat until the sugar is dissolved.
4. Mix lemon juice into chilled milk until stiff. Fold in the egg mixture and pour it quickly into the freezing tray.
5. Sprinkle the remaining cracker crumbs over the top.
6. Freeze until firm.
7. Cut into squares.
